caption: The scene captures a close-up view of a vehicle's digital dashboard display. The interface features a circular gauge on the left with red markings and a central digital screen. On this screen, white text reads "BRAKE" next to a red brake icon, followed by the instructions "Press Brake and Push Button to Start". Below these instructions, the odometer displays "20434 mi". The image shows a slight shift in perspective and lighting across the sequence, but the screen remains static with the same prompt and mileage displayed. The surrounding dashboard is a dark, metallic grey with smooth, curved contours. No people are visible in the frames, and the focus remains entirely on the instrument cluster's start-up sequence.
